brief_justification: Arrives at exactly 9 hours with correct arithmetic; Goes one level beyond the calculation by correctly identifying the omitted variable implication for the researcher's causal claim; No self-monitoring — proceeds directly to answer without questioning assumptions or approach; No verification of any kind — no sanity check or re-derivation; Uses 'may simply reflect' which hedges slightly but offers no structured uncertainty analysis or confidence framing; Considers only the one path from calculation to conclusion, no alternative confounds or explanations explored; Shows the full derivation chain (15 min × 36 weeks = 540 min = 9 hrs) but does not trace how the 15 min/week figure itself was derived from the problem's embedded assumptions
